summary: Completed frontend testing for fence before/after image gallery addition. All 4 new fence images successfully integrated into both React live preview and static GitHub Pages site.
passed_tests: React app loads without runtime errors or console errors
Before/After gallery displays all 6 cards (4 fence + 2 deck)
fence-before-wide.jpg loads with caption 'Fence before cleaning'
fence-after-wide.jpg loads with caption 'Fence after cleaning'
fence-before-gate.jpg loads with caption 'Fence gate before cleaning'
fence-after-gate.jpg loads with caption 'Fence gate after cleaning'
All 4 fence images load successfully from /assets/*.jpg
Deck before/after cards remain in gallery
Static site index.html references all 4 fence images
Static site serves all 4 fence images with 200 OK status
All book consultation buttons clickable (header, hero, footer, mobile)
Service accordions work correctly (Garbage cans, Fences, etc.)
Contact information displays correctly throughout site
Mobile layout responsive with CTA bar visible
Footer contact info present on both sites
